title: Arf (disambiguation)
content:
'''Arf''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Advanced Recon Force trooper]]s''', also referred to as '''ARF troopers''' or as '''AT-RT Drivers'''

==Legends==
*'''[[Advanced Recon Force trooper/Legends|Advanced Recon Force trooper]]s''', commonly called '''ARF troopers'''
*'''[[Arf (astromech droid)|Arf]]''', the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] that served on the ''[[Mourning Glory]]''
*'''[[Arf (K-9 droid)|Arf]]''', the [[K-9 series hunting-and-tracking droid|K-9]] droid owned by [[Havet Storm]]

==Out of universe==
*'''[[Arthur Papadam]]''', author of ''[[What's The Story?]]'' on [[StarWars.com]], used '''Arf Maul''' as his alias.

{{Disambig}}
